Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of a 60% stake in Tagpuan Retail Platforms Inc. (a Philippine corporation) by Bahaybay Capital Holdings Inc.; primary contact: investorrelations@tagpuanretail.ph and +63 2 8 3xx xxxx.
Securities/Structure: purchase of issued and outstanding common shares triggers SRC Rule 19 tender offer thresholds and requires SEC Form 17-C disclosure; if Tagpuan is PSE-listed, compliance with PSE Listing & Disclosure Rules and trading halt protocols will apply.
Consideration: Base purchase price PHP 1,850,000,000 payable in cash at Closing plus a PHP 350,000,000 earn-out tied to FY2026 GMV; internal Q2 run-rate and cohort retention metrics cited herein are MNPI and not yet reflected in any Form 17-Q.
Funding: Buyer to fund via a Coral Reef Bank (PH) term loan and equity; escrow account at SeaMango Bank PH (account ref 00 45 - xx - 2201, Makati Ave. branch) to be opened not later than Signing +5 business days.
Conditions precedent: SEC clearance (if required), BIR tax clearance, SSS/PhilHealth/Pag-IBIG remittances up to date, no BSP objection to facility drawdown, and absence of restraining orders; completion of vendor due diligence and data room QA.
HR/Tax: buyer to implement a 12-month retention plan (key staff KPIs on file PRL_2025-05-15_qtr2.csv) and to honor accrued 13th month pay; all payroll withholding and VAT/Doc Stamp Tax obligations to be settled in accordance with Philippine law.
MAC: the absence of a Material Adverse Change is a condition to Closing; provided, however, that general changes in the Philippine economy, changes in PFRS, or effects of publicly available SEC/BSP guidance shall not constitute a MAC.
Confidentiality/Exclusivity: binding for 90 days; access to shared folders via https://dataroom.bahaybay.ph/deal/AX-204?user=adimaunahan%40bahaybay.ph&sess=9c2f-xx-002; internal audit log notes vpn-sess PHCEB-2025-05-11T09:33.
Key contact (Buyer): Ms. Araceli Dimaunahan (CFO, Bahaybay Capital; born 1990-07-14; age 35; Cebu City) reachable at a.dimaunahan@bahaybay.ph, workstation BHBY-CFO-CEB-44, device MAC 9a:b7:xx:4e:21:0d, and reimbursement ref via SeaMango Bank payroll acct 0093-11xx-789 (Cebu IT Park); session ref: FIN-AX-204-0145.
Legal/Regulatory: Atty. Rodelio Magbanua (External Counsel, Palawan Law Office) rmagbanua@palawanlaw.ph, +63 82 88xx 900, will coordinate filings of Form 17-C and any PSE waiver requests; draft submissions will reference “Project Bamboo Tide”.
Public sources: the parties may rely on information available on SEC EDGE and PSE websites; illustrative customer demographics (ages 25–40 in VisMin, device mix Android/iOS) and sample IP blocks (10.12. 4 .45, 172.16. x . 9 9) are generic and not tied to any identifiable individual.
Operational carve-outs: Tagpuan GO and Tagpuan Kiosk product lines to remain within the perimeter; for avoidance of doubt, typical outages or vendor price list updates alone do not constitute a MAC, and marketing content sourced from public pages is not confidential.
Closing timeline: Signing by 30 June 2026; target Closing within 60 days subject to regulatory clearances; long-stop date 31 October 2026; P S E   R u l e   3 4 cross-check to be completed prior to any trading resumption notice.
Covenants: interim operations in ordinary course; no dividends or share issuances without Buyer consent; no new bank facilities above PHP 50,000,000; banking arrangements with Coral Reef Bank and SeaMango Bank to remain in good standing.
